app.name: ChatFlick
app.developers: Hammad Ashraf (from coreXmanzoid) — Full-stack developer, designer, and sole creator of ChatFlick. A student from IUB — Computer Science. Passionate about building engaging social platforms and exploring AI integration.
app.description: A Flask-based full-stack social microblogging web application with dual desktop and mobile UIs, email and Google OAuth authentication, tiered subscription plans (free / pro / enterprise) enforced server-side via subscription.json, manual payment verification for upgrades, follower relationships, post creation and engagement with moderation, threaded comments, in-app and Firebase push notifications, profile management with plan-based Cloudinary image hosting, granular settings and privacy controls, an admin dashboard with payment and post-report workflows, a Groq-powered AI assistant (Manzoid-AI) with ChatFlick.json knowledge injection, and account data export.

stack.backend: Flask (Python), SQLAlchemy ORM, Flask-Login, Authlib (Google OAuth), itsdangerous (signed tokens)
stack.frontend: Jinja2 templates, Bootstrap 5, jQuery, Bootstrap Icons, Vanilla JS
stack.media: Cloudinary (profile image upload, resize, overwrite; resolution varies by plan)
stack.push_notifications: Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) via firebase-admin SDK
stack.ai: Groq API — llama-3.1-8b-instant model; ChatFlick.json used as retrieval knowledge base
stack.subscriptions: subscription.json — source of truth for per-plan feature limits and status mapping

user_status_levels.UNVERIFIED: Default status after registration. Severely restricted: cannot follow, comment, upload profile photos, or receive mention notifications until email is verified.
user_status_levels.VERIFIED: Email confirmed (free tier). Maps to subscription plan 'free' via subscription_manager. Full basic platform access per free-tier limits in subscription.json.
user_status_levels.PENDING_PRO: User submitted a payment screenshot for Pro/Enterprise upgrade; awaiting admin approval. Treated as verified for @verified_user. Maps to free plan features until approved.
user_status_levels.PRO: Paid Pro tier (admin-approved payment or manual admin grant). Maps to subscription plan 'pro'. Shows verified badge on profile.
user_status_levels.ENTERPRISE: Top paid tier. Maps to subscription plan 'enterprise'. Full enterprise limits from subscription.json.
user_status_levels.DEACTIVED: User self-deactivated via danger zone (status stored as 'DEACTIVED'). Data preserved. Reactivated by logging back in.
user_status_levels.BLOCKED: Set by admin (manually or automatically after 3 warnings, or via post-report moderation). Prevents posting, commenting, following, and AI usage. Reversible by admin.

subscription_system.description: Feature gating is driven by subscription.json and enforced server-side through app/utils/subscription_manager.py. UserData.status maps to a plan; UserData.subscription_plan is a computed property.
subscription_system.config_file: subscription.json at project root (sibling to ChatFlick.json)

plans.free: status_value VERIFIED — post_length 180, 10 posts/day, no edit, 3 hashtags, no mentions, AI via /api_chat with 0 memory and 5 requests/day
plans.pro: status_value PRO — post_length 230, 50 posts/day, edit within 3 min, mentions enabled, AI via /Manzoid-AI with 8 memory exchanges and 100 requests/day, $12/mo
plans.enterprise: status_value ENTERPRISE — unlimited posts/comments/AI where -1 means no limit, $49/mo

helpers.get_plan(user): Derives plan from status unless _subscription_plan_override is set
helpers.get_feature(user, section, key): Reads nested feature from plan config
helpers.feature_required(section, key): Decorator — boolean feature must be true
helpers.session_lifetime_for(user): timedelta from auth.session_lifetime_days; enforced in @app.before_request when session.permanent

subscription_system.context_processor_injection: All templates receive subscription_plans, subscription_plan, subscription_feature, subscription_has_feature, subscription_limit
subscription_system.not_yet_enforced: ads, support SLA routing, follower-growth analytics, API integrations, team seats/SSO, multi-device session registry, comments_per_day counter (TODO in subscription_manager)

decorators.verified_user: Checks (current_user.status or '').upper() in {VERIFIED, PENDING_PRO, PRO, ENTERPRISE}. PRO and ENTERPRISE users pass. Returns 403 on failure.
decorators.pro_user: Checks current_user.subscription_plan in {pro, enterprise}. Used where Pro-tier access is required beyond verified status.
decorators.only_admin: Checks current_user.username in {coreXmanzoid, manza}. Username-based admin check.

authentication.description: Handles signup, credential login, Google OAuth login, email verification, password reset, and logout.

routes.GET/POST /signup/<int:st>: st=0 renders signup form. st=1 (POST JSON) checks username availability. st=0 POST processes signup form with CAPTCHA.
routes.GET/POST /login: Renders login form or processes credentials. Requires CAPTCHA. rememberMe sets session.permanent only if plan has auth.is_remember_me; stores login_at for session lifetime enforcement.
routes.GET /login/google: Initiates Google OAuth redirect. Blocked if authenticated user's plan lacks auth.google_oauth.
routes.GET /google/authorized: Google OAuth callback. Creates or retrieves user. New users get status='VERIFIED' (uppercase).
routes.GET/POST /reset-password: GET renders reset form. POST (JSON) validates CAPTCHA, sends reset link email if email exists.
routes.GET/POST /reset-password/<token>: GET renders new-password form. POST (JSON) validates token and resets password.
routes.GET /verify-email/<token>: Verifies email token and sets status to 'VERIFIED'. Token expires after 20 minutes.
routes.POST /email-verification: Sends verification email to current logged-in user.
routes.GET /logout/<int:st>: Clears fb_auth_token, logs out. st=1 redirects to /home, st=2 (switch account) redirects to /login.

services.AuthService.create_user: Hashes password with pbkdf2:sha256 salt_length=8. Sets status to UNVERIFIED.
services.GoogleAuthService.get_or_create_user: Looks up by email. If new, builds unique username from Google given_name, sets status='VERIFIED', generates random password.
services.CaptchaService.verify_turnstile: Posts to Cloudflare /turnstile/v0/siteverify with secret key and IP.

edge_cases: Password reset returns same JSON response whether email exists or not (anti-enumeration).
Username availability check returns status='abondonded' (misspelled) when username exists.
CAPTCHA is required on signup, login, and password-reset-request flows.
Remember-me is plan-gated; free users cannot get permanent sessions even if checkbox is checked.

membership_and_verification.description: Controls feature gating based on account status tiers and subscription.json plan limits.

behavior.home_page: Desktop /home: is_user_verified when status not in UNVERIFIED, BANNED, BLOCKED, RESTRICTED, DEACTIVATED. Mobile /mobile-home: verified when status in VERIFIED, PENDING_PRO, PRO, ENTERPRISE.
behavior.verified_user_decorator: Accepts VERIFIED, PENDING_PRO, PRO, ENTERPRISE (case-normalized uppercase).
behavior.protected_features: Follow/unfollow, comments, profile image upload, mention notifications, and Manzoid-AI require @verified_user plus per-feature subscription checks.
behavior.pricing_page: GET /pricing — renders pricing.html with load_plans(). Monthly/yearly toggle in UI.
behavior.payment_flow: GET /payment — Pro upgrade form (redirects if already PRO/ENTERPRISE). POST /payment/submit — multipart form with screenshot; sets PENDING_PRO; stores PaymentSubmission in instance/payment_screenshots/.
behavior.admin_approval: POST /admin/api/payments/<id>/approve sets user.subscription_plan from submission; reject reverts PENDING_PRO to VERIFIED.

posts.description: Full post lifecycle: creation, editing (plan-gated window), deletion, hashtag extraction, mention parsing, moderation status.

routes.POST /managePosts/1: Create post. Validates user_id matches current_user.id. Enforces post_length, post_per_day, max_hashtags_per_post from plan. Mentions only if can_mention. Returns timestamp as ISO UTC.
routes.POST /managePosts/2: Edit post. Requires PostService.can_edit (owner + can_edit_post feature + edit_window_minutes). Re-validates post_length. Does NOT re-parse hashtags or mentions.
routes.POST /managePosts/3: Delete post. Requires PostService.can_delete (owner + can_delete_post + delete_window_minutes). Cascade-deletes comments.
routes.GET /showPosts/<int:state>/<int:id>: state=0 random, state=1 profile, state=2 following feed, state=3 liked, state=4 reposted. Query params: per_page (1-25), append=1, exclude_ids (comma-separated). Plan limits cap feed sizes. Returns posts.html with editable_post_ids.
routes.POST /PostAction/<int:state>: state=1 like (can_like), state=2 repost (can_repost), state=3 comment like (can_like), state=4 share (can_share). Returns 403 if plan disallows action.

models.Post: id, content, user_id (FK), hashtags (JSON list), mentions (JSON list of {user_id, username}), timestamp (DateTime UTC), likes, comments, reposts, shares, status (ACTIVE default; REMOVED when admin moderates). Cascade deletes Comments.
models.Comments: id, content, post_id (FK), user_id (FK), mentions (JSON), likes. No timestamp field.

services.PostService.create_post: Enforces plan limits. Splits by newlines, strips #words per line. Hashtags stored as list. Mentions empty if plan lacks can_mention.
services.PostActionService.like_post: Per-user uniqueness via current_user.liked_posts. Floors at 0 on unlike.

edge_cases: Frontend may enforce character limits; backend also enforces via subscription.json per plan.
Editing does not re-parse hashtags or mentions.
Self-like, self-repost, self-share are not blocked at the backend.
Comment likes are not uniquely tracked.
Share counter has no per-user tracking.
Milestone notifications (100, 1K, 10K) triggered client-side in home.js and mobile-home.js.
FeedService._visible_posts hides posts with status REMOVED.

feed.description: Builds post collections for various feed types, rendered via posts.html template.

feed_types.state=0 (random): FeedService.random_posts() — ORDER BY RANDOM(), plan-limited, supports exclude_ids.
feed_types.state=1 (profile): FeedService.profile_posts(user_id) — newest first, optional limit and exclude_ids.
feed_types.state=2 (following): FeedService.following_posts(user_id) — posts from followed accounts, plan-limited following_feed_limit.
feed_types.state=3 (liked): FeedService.liked_posts(user_id) — IDs in user.liked_posts, plan-limited liked_posts_limit.
feed_types.state=4 (reposted): FeedService.reposted_posts(user_id) — returns (posts, username) tuple for 'X reposted' label, now has limit support.

edge_cases: Following feed returns empty when user follows nobody.
exclude_ids query param prevents duplicate posts when appending feeds via AJAX.
Random feed is not personalized.
Only ACTIVE posts (or null status) appear in feeds.

comments.description: Threaded comment system on posts. Single level (no nested replies).

routes.GET /comments/<int:post_id>: Returns rendered comments.html with post and up to 15 comments sorted by likes DESC.
routes.POST /comments/<int:post_id> (state=1): Creates comment via CommentService.add_comment. Enforces comment_length and can_comment. Returns {mentions, comment_id, comments_count}.

services.CommentService.add_comment: Plan-gated length and can_comment. Mentions only if can_mention. Increments post.comments.
services.CommentService.get_comments: Ordered by likes DESC. Route slices to [:15].

edge_cases: Requires @verified_user.
Backend rejects over-limit comments with ValueError → 403 JSON.
Comments model has no timestamp.
Post options menu in comments.html mirrors home.js (report, placeholders for follow/block/copy-link).

social_graph.description: Follow and unfollow relationships. Follower/following counts on profiles.

routes.POST /follows/<int:id>/<int:st>: st=1 follow, st=2 unfollow. Requires @verified_user. Enforces can_follow and max_following. Returns {status, follower_id, follower_name, followersCount}.
routes.GET /exploreAccounts/<int:id>/<string:st: state='random' | 'following' | 'followers' | username search. Passes following_ids set to template.

models.Follow: id, follower_id (FK), following_id (FK). Bidirectional relationships on UserData.

services.FollowService.follow_user: Checks can_follow, duplicate follow (silent return if exists), max_following limit.
services.FollowService.unfollow_user: Deletes existing Follow row if found.
services.AccountService.search_accounts: Username CONTAINS query, ordered by follower count; random.sample(10) if > 10 results.

edge_cases: No explicit self-follow block at backend.
Duplicate follows prevented by query-before-insert.
Search only matches usernames.

profile.description: User profile display, about page, and profile picture upload.

routes.GET /profile/<int:id>: id=0 returns newPost.html. Otherwise profile.html with is_following flag.
routes.POST /update-profile/<int:id>: Uploads to Cloudinary at plan's profile_image_resolution. Requires @verified_user.

cloudinary.transformation: width/height from plan (e.g. 256x256 free, 512x512 pro), crop fill, quality auto, fetch_format auto

profile_template_features: Profile image, name, PRO badge if status==PRO
Tabs: Posts, Likes, Reposts (own); Posts, Reposts (others)

settings.description: Account settings across 7 sections with plan-gated saves.

routes.GET /setting/<string:section>: profile-info, account-info, change-password, privacy-setting, notifications-setting, support, delete-account.
routes.POST /setting/account-setting: Email (resets UNVERIFIED on change), birthdate, website (can_set_website), about.
routes.POST /setting/create-support-request: Support ticket; auto-generates AIService.answer_support_request reply in JSON; requires can_submit_support_ticket.
routes.POST /danger-zone/<int:st>: st=1 deactivate (DEACTIVED), st=2 delete account. Plan-gated can_deactivate/can_delete.

user_settings_model.storage: user.setting MutableDict JSON. Dot-path keys via get_setting/set_setting.
user_settings_model.set_setting_behavior: Values equal to default are deleted. Invalid paths raise KeyError.

notifications.description: In-app notification inbox and Firebase push delivery with per-recipient plan checks.

routes.POST /save-token: Saves FCM token; requires push_notifications feature. Clears duplicate tokens on other users.
routes.GET /notification-health: Firebase admin and web config diagnostic JSON.
routes.POST /notification-test-push: Sends test push to current user.
routes.GET /notifications: Renders notifications.html; filters by notification_history_days plan limit; max 15 rows.
routes.GET /notifications/mark_read/<int:user_i: Marks all read. Requires user_id == current_user.id.
routes.POST /send-notification-route/<int:state: state=2 broadcast to followers, state=3 single recipient. Push checked against recipient's plan, not sender's.

model.Notification: id, recipient_id, sender_id (nullable), title, message, type, identifier, is_read, created_at (UTC).

services.NotificationService.update_or_create: Deduplicates; returns None if recipient lacks in_app_notifications.
services.send_notification (push_service): FCM Message; recipient must have push_notifications feature.

edge_cases: update_or_create returns None for deleted users or disabled in-app notifications — routes guard against None before push.
Milestone notifications client-side only.
Notification history trimmed by plan days (7 free, 30 pro, unlimited enterprise).

ai_assistant.description: Groq-powered Manzoid-AI with ChatFlick.json knowledge retrieval, per-user memory, support-answer mode, and plan limits.

routes.GET /Manzoid-AI: Renders AI.html. Requires login + @verified_user + ai_access feature.
routes.POST /Manzoid-AI: Authenticated chat. Uses current_user.id (not client-supplied). Enforces ai_message_length and ai_requests_per_day (stored in usage.ai settings). Memory from ai_conversation_memory plan limit.
routes.POST /api_chat: Public stateless endpoint (no auth). Max 1000 chars. Uses AIService.simple_chat.

services.AIService.chat: Per-user history keyed by str(user_id). max_history from plan (-1 = unlimited). max_tokens=320. Injects ChatFlickKnowledge.relevant_context.
services.AIService.answer_support_request: Support mode with prior answered Support examples from DB. Used by admin AI-answer route and support ticket creation.
services.ChatFlickKnowledge: Loads ChatFlick.json, flattens to sections, keyword-scores up to 4 sections (900 chars each) for system prompt injection.

edge_cases: user_history is in-process memory; resets on server restart.
Free plan references ai_route /ai-chat in subscription.json but actual free route is /api_chat; Pro uses /Manzoid-AI.
Daily AI usage tracked in user.setting usage.ai with date rollover.
Returns 503 JSON when Groq unavailable.
AI page loaded via AJAX in home.js: $('.div3').load('/Manzoid-AI').

admin.description: Admin dashboard at /admin. Protected by @login_required + @verified_user + @only_admin (usernames coreXmanzoid, manza).

routes.GET /admin/api/dashboard: Returns supportRequests, userReports, postReports, managedUsers, paymentSubmissions.
routes.POST /admin/api/post-reports/<id>/warn-a: Increments warnings; auto-blocks at 3; sends moderation_warning notification.
routes.POST /admin/api/users/<id>/warning|block: Warning counter, block with previous_status saved, unblock restores.

models.Support: id, category, message, user_id, admin_reply, created_at, updated_at, status (PENDING/ANSWERED).
models.Report: id, report_text, user_id, created_at, status — user-submitted account reports.
models.ReportPost: id, post_id, reported_by, reason, details, status, admin_action, admin_note, created_at, reviewed_at.
models.PaymentSubmission: id, user_id, full_name, email, plan, payment_method, transaction_id (unique), screenshot_path, note, status, admin_note, created_at, reviewed_at.

admin.frontend: admin.js — dashboard, support, user reports, post reports, payments, user management panels.

post_moderation.description: User-facing post reporting and admin moderation workflow.

routes.POST /reports/posts: JSON {post_id, category, message}. Requires can_report_content. Upserts pending ReportPost per reporter+post.

post_moderation.client: home.js report-center overlay; post options menu items (follow-me, favorites, interested, copy-link, block-user) show 'coming soon' toasts except report and interest toggles.

account_discovery.description: Account search and suggestions for explore tab.

behavior.search: Username match, follower count order, max 10.

mobile.description: Dedicated mobile UI; auto-redirect from /home on mobile User-Agent.
mobile.template: mobile-home.html — bottom nav, accounts-row, feed, fullpost overlay.
mobile.script: mobile-home.js — mirrors home.js; showAi() posts to /Manzoid-AI.
mobile.more_menu: Settings, About, Terms, Liked posts, Logout, Switch account, Help.

UserData.fields: id, name, username (unique), profile_image_url, email (unique), contact, password (hashed), fb_auth_token, liked_posts (JSON), birth_date, reposted_posts (JSON), status (default UNVERIFIED), setting (JSON)
UserData.relationships: posts, comments, support, reports, followers, following, received_notifications, sent_notifications, payment_submissions

data_model.Post: Includes status ACTIVE|REMOVED. Cascade deletes comment_entries.

static_pages./: Landing (index.html) — Google sign-in, Create Account, Login.
static_pages./pricing: pricing.html — plan cards from subscription.json; links to /payment.
static_pages./firebase-messaging-sw.js: Dynamic service worker script from main_routes.

client_scripts.home.js: Desktop SPA. ajaxWithAbort, feed append with exclude_ids, post actions, notifications, profile upload, report overlay, post options menu (report live; follow/block/copy-link coming soon).
client_scripts.mobile-home.js: Mobile SPA equivalent including AI UI built in JS.
client_scripts.setting.js: Settings save/cancel, Cropper.js upload, danger zone, toasts.
client_scripts.admin.js: Admin SPA with payments and post reports.

firebase_and_push.config: FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT env or json files at project root.
firebase_and_push.client_config: firebase-messaging-sw.js and firebase.js (gitignored); window.firebaseRuntimeConfig in templates.
firebase_and_push.push_delivery: Per-recipient plan check in notification routes and push_service.

cloudinary_config.resolution: Passed from subscription profile.profile_image_resolution per upload.

app_factory.create_app: Loads .env, Flask app, SECRET_KEY hardcoded, SQLite default DB, db.create_all(), subscription session lifetime before_request.
app_factory.context_processor: inject_runtime_config — firebase, subscription helpers, current_time, current_user.

known_bugs_and_issues: SECRET_KEY is hardcoded in __init__.py — should be loaded from environment variable.
subscription.json free tier lists ai_route /ai-chat but implemented public route is POST /api_chat.
Comment likes have no per-user uniqueness tracking.
Editing posts does not re-parse hashtags or @mentions.
Self-like, self-repost, self-share not blocked server-side.
post_action_service may not defensively handle missing Post/Comment in all code paths.
home /home vs /mobile-home use slightly different is_user_verified status checks (DEACTIVATED vs DEACTIVED spelling).
Post options menu items (follow-me, add-to-favorites, copy-link, block-user) are UI placeholders only.
configure_cloudinary() eager import can fail startup if Cloudinary env vars missing.
Some subscription.json limits (comments_per_day, ads, SLA) documented but not yet enforced server-side.
